name: gemma-figma-mcp-plugin
description: Figma plugin bridging the Figma canvas to the Gemma 4 MCP server over WebSocket.

scripts.build: esbuild src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/code.js --target=es2017 --format=iife && esbuild src/ui.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/ui.js --target=es2017 --format=iife && node scripts/build-ui.mjs
